repository.description: Optional GitHub repository in owner/name form. If omitted, infer from the current checkout.

reviewer.description: Reviewer login to query. Defaults to @me when using GitHub CLI.

pr_number.description: Optional pull request number or URL. When provided, analyze this PR directly instead of listing the requested-review inbox.

pr_filter.description: Optional filters such as label, author, base branch, head branch, or PR number.

max_prs.description: Maximum number of requested-review PRs to analyze after risk ranking.

publish_high_risk_comments.description: When true with pr_number, publish exactly one GitHub PR comment containing only blocker or high-criticality findings from the current run.
